headline: Elevance Health to Hold Conference Call and Webcast to Discuss Second Quarter 2026 Results on July 15, 2026
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, July 06, 2026--Elevance Health (NYSE: ELV) will release second quarter 2026 financial results on July 15, 2026, at 6:00 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time ("EDT"). Management will review these results and its outlook during a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EDT that same morning. The conference call should be accessed at least 15 minutes prior to its start with the following numbers:

headline: UnitedHealth Bets on Profitability Over Growth: Will It Pay Off?
summary: UnitedHealth is prioritizing profitability over rapid growth as improving margins, stronger earnings and Optum expansion aim to support a long-term turnaround.

raw.headline: UnitedHealth Bets on Profitability Over Growth: Will It Pay Off?
raw.summary: UnitedHealth is prioritizing profitability over rapid growth as improving margins, stronger earnings and Optum expansion aim to support a long-term turnaround.

headline: What CVS Health Stock Was Telling You About Its Three-Dollar Earnings Prize
summary: Before the stock surged, management laid out a turnaround plan for its Aetna unit that was so explicit, they practically put a price tag on it.

raw.headline: What CVS Health Stock Was Telling You About Its Three-Dollar Earnings Prize
raw.summary: Before the stock surged, management laid out a turnaround plan for its Aetna unit that was so explicit, they practically put a price tag on it.

headline: Can Centene's Fraud Prevention Strategy Support Margin Recovery?
summary: CNC expands AI-driven fraud prevention and payment integrity to improve Medicaid margins, boost cost controls and support long-term earnings growth.

raw.headline: Can Centene's Fraud Prevention Strategy Support Margin Recovery?

headline: Insurer Elevance Seeks Recalculated Medicare Star Rating in Lawsuit
summary: Elevance sued HHS and CMS, alleging unequal Medicare Star Ratings treatment cost it about $115 million in 2027 bonus payments.

raw.headline: Insurer Elevance Seeks Recalculated Medicare Star Rating in Lawsuit
